# Pull Request

## OpenSpec
- [ ] Change id: `...`
- [ ] OpenSpec files updated (`proposal.md`, `design.md`, `tasks.md`, relevant spec deltas)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria mapped to implementation

## What Changed
Describe the core behavior changes and why they are needed.

## Verification
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Build

Commands/results:

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Reviewer Focus
Call out areas needing deeper review (auth, crypto, migrations, notification logic, concurrency).
